cases.name: normalize-fuzzy-all-transform-families

ＡＢＣ１２３   
café
‘a’ ‚b‛
“c” „d‟
‐‑‒–—―−
a b c d e f g h i j k l m　n

ABC123
café
'a' 'b'
"c" "d"
-------
a b c d e f g h i j k l m n

cases.name: fuzzy-find-trailing-whitespace
cases.content:
line one   
line two  
line three

expected.contentForReplacement:
line one
line two
line three

expected.patch:
--- edit-test.txt
+++ edit-test.txt
@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
-Hello, world!
\ No newline at end of file
+Hello, testing!
\ No newline at end of file

cases.name: edit-not-found
cases.expectedError: Could not find the exact text in edit-test.txt. The old text must match exactly including all whitespace and newlines.

cases.name: edit-duplicate
cases.upstreamCase: packages/coding-agent/test/tools.test.ts:edit tool/fail if text appears multiple times
cases.expectedError: Found 3 occurrences of the text in edit-test.txt. The text must be unique. Please provide more context to make it unique.

expected.diff:
-1 alpha
+1 ALPHA
 2 beta
-3 gamma
+3 GAMMA
 4 delta

-1 foo
-2 bar
+1 foo bar
+2 BAR
 3 baz

cases.name: edit-overlapping-regions
cases.expectedError: edits[0] and edits[1] overlap in edit-overlap.txt. Merge them into one edit or target disjoint regions.

cases.name: edit-no-partial-application
cases.expectedError: Could not find edits[1] in edit-no-partial.txt. The oldText must match exactly including all whitespace and newlines.

cases.name: edit-empty-old-text-single
cases.expectedError: oldText must not be empty in empty.txt.

cases.name: edit-empty-old-text-multiple
cases.expectedError: edits[1].oldText must not be empty in empty-multi.txt.

cases.name: edit-multi-not-found-index
cases.expectedError: Could not find edits[1] in not-found-multi.txt. The oldText must match exactly including all whitespace and newlines.

cases.name: edit-multi-duplicate-index
cases.expectedError: Found 2 occurrences of edits[1] in duplicate-multi.txt. Each oldText must be unique. Please provide more context to make it unique.

cases.name: edit-no-change-single
cases.expectedError: No changes made to no-change.txt. The replacement produced identical content. This might indicate an issue with special characters or the text not existing as expected.

cases.name: edit-no-change-multiple
cases.expectedError: No changes made to no-change-multi.txt. The replacements produced identical content.

cases.name: edit-normalized-empty-separator-count-quirk
cases.expectedError: Found 2 occurrences of the text in normalized-empty.txt. The text must be unique. Please provide more context to make it unique.

cases.name: fuzzy-trailing-whitespace
cases.content:
line one   
line two  
line three

expected.baseContent:
line one   
line two  
line three
expected.diff:
-1 line one   
-2 line two  
+1 replaced
 3 line three
expected.patch:
--- trailing-ws.txt
+++ trailing-ws.txt
@@ -1,3 +1,2 @@
-line one   
-line two  
+replaced
 line three

cases.name: fuzzy-fullwidth-chinese-punctuation
cases.content:
你好，世界
你好（世界）

edits.oldText:
你好,世界
你好(世界)

expected.baseContent:
你好，世界
你好（世界）
expected.diff:
-1 你好，世界
-2 你好（世界）
+1 你好，pi
+2 你好(pi)
expected.patch:
--- chinese-punctuation.txt
+++ chinese-punctuation.txt
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-你好，世界
-你好（世界）
+你好，pi
+你好(pi)

cases.name: fuzzy-not-found
cases.expectedError: Could not find the exact text in no-match.txt. The old text must match exactly including all whitespace and newlines.

cases.name: fuzzy-duplicates-after-normalization
cases.expectedError: Found 2 occurrences of the text in fuzzy-dups.txt. The text must be unique. Please provide more context to make it unique.
